tool_name: Gage R&R Measurement System Analysis (AIAG MSA 4th Ed.)

inputs.name: Repeatability — EV (Equipment Variation)
inputs.hint: Standard deviation of measurements taken by same operator on same part

inputs.name: Reproducibility — AV (Appraiser Variation)
inputs.hint: Standard deviation between average measurements of different operators

inputs.name: Part Variation — PV (Part Variation)
inputs.hint: True part-to-part variation of the production process

inputs.name: Tolerance Band (USL - LSL)
inputs.hint: From product drawing: Upper Specification Limit - Lower Specification Limit

inputs.name: Sigma Multiplier
inputs.hint: AIAG MSA: 5.15 (99% coverage interval) or 6.00 (99.73% coverage)

formulas: GRR_Total = SQRT(POWER(ev_equipment_variation, 2) + POWER(av_appraiser_variation, 2))   // [unit] Total Gage R&R (GRR)
GRR_Spread = sigma_multiplier * GRR_Total   // [unit] GRR spread (6σ or 5.15σ)
Pct_GRR_to_TV = (GRR_Total / TV_Total_Variation) * 100   // [%] GRR to TV ratio — primary metric
Pct_GRR_to_Tolerance = (GRR_Spread / tolerance_band) * 100   // [%] GRR to Tolerance ratio — secondary metric | Source: AIAG MSA 4th Ed.
NDC = FLOOR(1.41 * (pv_part_variation / GRR_Total))   // [—] Number of Distinct Categories (NDC) — must be >= 5
False_Reject_Risk_Pct = 100 * (1 - (1 - 2 * (GRR_Total / tolerance_band)))   // [%] Estimated risk of false rejection
Cpk_Measurement_Bias = (tolerance_band / 2 - 3 * process_sigma * TV_Total_Variation) / (3 * GRR_Total)   // [—] Measurement system Cpk impact estimate

sample_minimum.error_msg: Insufficient data: Total measurements (n*k*r) is less than 60. AIAG MSA recommends minimum 10 parts * 3 appraisers * 2 trials = 60 measurements for statistical reliability.

grr_zero_check.error_msg: EV and AV are both equal to zero — physically impossible. Gauge resolution may be insufficient or data entered incorrectly.

pv_dominance.error_msg: Part variation is smaller than gauge variation. Either parts are produced with identical dimensions (process too stable) or gauge resolution is insufficient. Review measurement scale.

tolerance_min.error_msg: Tolerance band cannot be zero or negative (division error).

smart_warnings.message: SYSTEM REJECTED - NDC = 1: The gauge cannot distinguish between parts. Risk of false rejects/accepts is high. Gauge cannot be used for this tolerance. Calibration or replacement required.
UNACCEPTABLE - NDC < 5: System is insufficient to monitor the process. Does not meet IATF 16949 minimum NDC >= 5 requirement. Process control cannot be established; high risk of non-conformance.
GRR/TV > 30%: Measurement system is unacceptable. Gauge variation masks actual process variation. Reported Cpk is misleading. Gauge cannot be used for product acceptance.
GRR/TV 10-30%: Conditional acceptance. Insufficient for critical products or strict process capability studies. Gauge improvement or replacement should be scheduled.
GRR/Tolerance > 30%: Gauge variation consumes >30% of the tolerance band. Specifications cannot be reliably verified. False acceptance/rejection rate is unacceptable.
Appraiser variation (AV) exceeds equipment variation (EV). Problem is not the gauge itself, but the method or training. Establish a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) and retrain appraisers.
